postData.contentHtml:
For those seeking the pinnacle of luxury and an escape into nature, ROKI Collection Queenstown has unveiled an extraordinary offering: 'Rees Valley by ROKI.' This exclusive experience transports guests via a private helicopter ride to a gourmet lunch nestled deep within the untouched wilderness of New Zealand's Southern Alps, specifically the remote Rees Valley.

Accessible only by a picturesque 10-minute helicopter flight, this unique dining adventure is designed to provide unparalleled tranquility and a profound connection with nature, all while indulging in world-class luxury. Guests are welcomed with Champagne upon arrival at ROKI's custom-built wilderness lodge. Designed by acclaimed New Zealand interior designer Virginia Fisher, the lodge is a forest sanctuary featuring crackling fireplaces, warm natural materials, and expansive views of the dramatic, unspoiled landscape characterized by an emerald-green river, ancient beech forests, and stunning alpine ridgelines.

At the heart of the experience is a gourmet lunch curated by ROKI's Culinary Director, Paul Froggatt, who holds two Michelin stars for the hotel's acclaimed restaurant, Essence. Chef Froggatt's seasonal menus showcase his produce-driven philosophy, highlighting locally sourced ingredients and flavors inspired by New Zealand's diverse environment. This one-of-a-kind culinary journey begins at NZD $11,000 for two guests, covering all land and air transfers, as well as food and beverages.

ROKI Collection Queenstown, which debuted in September 2025, has swiftly established itself as a premier luxury destination. Beyond the helicopter lunch, the intimate 15-suite property offers an exceptionally high staff-to-guest ratio, spacious rooms with gas fireplaces, plush furnishings, and sweeping Lake Wakatipu views. Guests can also savor a ten-course fine dining experience at Essence, explore other curated dining options like The Terrace and The Library, or unwind at ROKI Pure Spa, which offers cutting-edge treatments like the 'Sleep and Soothe Remedy.'

The introduction of such ultra-luxurious experiences by ROKI Collection Queenstown aligns with a broader trend in the region, as Queenstown increasingly positions itself to attract ultra-wealthy visitors, with discussions often including high-end offerings like heli-golf and multi-thousand-dollar-per-night accommodations. Social media sentiment regarding 'New Zealand helicopter lunch luxury' is predominantly positive, reflecting the allure of these exclusive, high-end adventures, though some minor debate is present, typical of such niche luxury markets.
postData.title: Soaring to New Heights: New Zealand's Most Exclusive Lunch is a Helicopter Away
postData.summary: ROKI Collection Queenstown introduces an unparalleled dining experience: a luxurious, Michelin-starred lunch in the remote Rees Valley, accessible only by a scenic helicopter journey. Discover the epitome of pampered disconnection amidst New Zealand's breathtaking Southern Alps.

sources.title: New Zealand’s Most Luxurious Lunch Is Only By Helicopter At This Hotel
